title: CIT List
description: Adds a list of all name based CIT (Custom Item Textures) that were added by your resource pack.
body: ## Information This fabric Minecraft mod scans All installed Resourcepacks For CIT (Custom Item Textures) that require the item to be renamed, and provides a list via its built in ModConfig. ## Picture ![Image showing the main ui of the mod, containing a list of textures.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41820496e2d29dd64e4ddc4588da87fb9a8465be.png) ## Dependency **Requires Modmenu** **Requires Fabric API**
